component.name: PlasmaZones Layout Editor
component.summary: Create and edit window zone layouts

description.p: The PlasmaZones Layout Editor is the visual companion to the PlasmaZones window-tiling system for KDE Plasma. Use it to author named zone layouts, drag zone boundaries on a live canvas, assign shaders, configure per-zone appearance, and pick the layout that should activate on each monitor.

ul.li: Drag-to-resize zones with snap-to-grid and zone-mirror tools
Fixed-geometry and relative-geometry zones for resolution-independent layouts
Per-zone shader effects with live previews
Import / export layout JSON for sharing
